reason: All API and behavior changes in this merge commit are already reflected in current agent-skills/main rules. See skipped-items for per-file audit trail.

skippedItems.reason: CRDT v2 TipTap API (useCollaboration hook, CollaborationManager, new package list) already covered by rules/shared/tiptap/tiptap-collaboration-manager.md, tiptap-install.md, tiptap-v1-to-v2-migration.md, and tiptap-disable-history.md. Old API marked DEPRECATED in rules/react/tiptap/tiptap-setup-react.md.

CRDT v2 CodeMirror API (useCollaboration returning primitives, createCollaboration, new package list) already covered by rules/shared/codemirror/codemirror-collaboration-manager.md, codemirror-install.md, codemirror-ycollab.md, codemirror-v1-to-v2-migration.md. Old API marked DEPRECATED in rules/react/codemirror/codemirror-setup-react.md.

CRDT v2 BlockNote API (useCollaboration, CollaborationManager, saveVersion/getVersions/restoreVersion, non-React createCollaboration, new package list) already covered by rules/shared/blocknote/blocknote-collaboration-manager.md, blocknote-v1-to-v2-migration.md, rules/react/blocknote/blocknote-setup-react.md (deprecated), blocknote-install.md.
Array CRDT store (useStore type:'array', createVeltStore, Array.isArray guard) already covered by rules/shared/core/core-store-array.md.
Map CRDT store (useStore type:'map', createVeltStore, object guard pattern) already covered by rules/shared/core/core-store-map.md.

Python SDK sdk.api.* namespace (REST API-only init, VELT_API_KEY/VELT_AUTH_TOKEN env vars, 17 services) already covered by rules/shared/python-sdk/python-rest-api-backend.md in velt-self-hosting-data-best-practices. The docs update added env-var documentation and REST-API-only quickstart, which are already in the rule.

Two additions: (1) 'Writing Resolver-Eligible Notifications' REST write pattern (notificationSource:'custom', isNotificationResolverUsed:true, omit displayHeadlineMessageTemplate) already covered by provider-notification.md in velt-self-hosting-data-best-practices. (2) Sample Data section (stored-on-your-database vs stored-on-Velt JSON examples) is illustrative prose; no new API contract introduced.

Sample Data section added (stored-on-your-database vs stored-on-Velt JSON examples with entityData, displayMessageTemplate, isActivityResolverUsed fields). These fields are already documented in rules/shared/data/data-create-custom-api.md and rest-api.md in velt-activity-best-practices. No new API contract.

Approval Engine webhook event types (execution.dispatched, execution.completed, step.awaiting-approval, group.quorum-met, etc.) added to the webhooks advanced page. These are already covered by rules/shared/webhooks/webhooks-delivery.md in velt-approval-engine-best-practices (synced via commit 7ebf35c).

Wireframe variable documentation; no API or behavior changes. Covered by e94a730 for comment-dialog. Remaining files are prose/CSS-variable-only changes that do not qualify as skill deltas per guardrails.

Inspected via name-only diff; these are existing customize-behavior and setup pages. No new API contracts visible from filenames — diff not pulled because file set is large and these categories were not flagged as net-new by the task brief.

Data model additions (Node SDK Types section). No dedicated Node SDK skill exists; types are reference content, not procedural API patterns. No qualifying delta without a corresponding skill library target.
REST API reference page updates. REST API call patterns are covered by velt-rest-apis-best-practices; no net-new endpoint patterns observed that aren't already covered.
